cases.title: Canonical profile is required before matching
cases.expected: User is guided to create or complete a canonical profile before matching.

cases.title: Job context is applied correctly
cases.expected: The selected job context is used consistently for scoring/matching.

cases.title: Role-specific tailoring avoids false claims
cases.expected: Tailored output aligns to the role without inventing candidate experience.

cases.title: Saved job state persists for returning user
cases.expected: Saved job or match state is retained for the user.
